label: Enhanced Basis Dashboard
description: Cross-venue basis trade monitor showing spot-perp spreads, funding rates, and arb opportunity scores.

l0.notes: All 9 checks green. Error boundary covered globally by WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx. requiredEntitlements=[defi-trading], availableOn=[defi,strategies]. No any types or @ts-ignore. Inline MOCK_BASIS_DATA removed; widget now reads basisTradeAssets + basisTradeMarketData from useDeFiData(). Loading, empty, and error states added following defi-waterfall-weights-widget pattern (isLoading=false/error=null stubs ready for when context adds those fields). No dead code remaining.

1.1.note: Widget reads exclusively via useDeFiData() hook — PASS. 1.2: defi-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() at line 188 and filters by scope (strategyIds filter on tradeHistory at line 210, org filter via hasDefiDesk at line 191) — PASS. 1.3–1.5: Org/client/strategy filters cascade in context via hasDefiDesk (org) and scopeStrategyIds (strategy); client-level cascade not explicitly present but org filter covers it — PARTIAL (context does not have explicit client-level cascade; noted as gap for L1 re-check when context is updated). 1.6: globalScope.organizationIds.length===0 returns true (all data) — PASS. 1.7: This widget does not import from lib/mocks/; venue labels are inline constants in the widget (short lookup tables, not reference data needing lib/constants/). No lib/mocks/ reference data present — PASS.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

l3.notes: Display-only widget — all agent checks pass. 3.3/3.4 N/A.

3.1.note: live ✓ / paper ✓ / batch ✓ — display-only enhanced basis dashboard.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or interval in mock. Production should stream basis/funding data.

4.1.note: No interactive action buttons. Display-only dashboard.

l5.notes: Display-only — no execution flow. L5 agent checks complete.

5.1.note: Target strategies: CARRY_BASIS_PERP, CARRY_STAKED_BASIS — enhanced basis dashboard provides composite view of basis spread, funding, and LP position for basis trade management.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file. Data via useDeFiData().

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

8.1.note: text-[10px] present for dense label sizing. Missing --text-label-micro token.

8.3.note: Shared components used from components/ui/* and shared/.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt. Human: keyboard pass required.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred pending --text-label-micro token. 8.5: human resize test required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Enhanced basis dashboard composites basis spread + funding + LP position into a unified view — more comprehensive than funding-matrix alone. Available on both defi and strategies pages.

dataContract.notes: Basis and funding data should stream via WebSocket in production. REST fallback for initial load. LP position data from on-chain oracle.

gaps.notes: CARRY_BASIS_PERP: No historical basis spread chart — only current snapshot shown.

knownIssues: L1.4: Client-level filter cascade not explicitly wired in defi-data-context.tsx — org filter subsumes it for now. Track for context update.
L1.1/isLoading+error: DeFiDataContextValue does not expose isLoading/error fields — stubs set to false/null; wire when context adds them.

findings.description: 0.1 Error boundary: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx wraps all grid widgets globally.
0.5 Inline mock data: MOCK_BASIS_DATA const removed; widget now consumes basisTradeAssets + basisTradeMarketData from useDeFiData() context hook.
0.6 Loading state: Added isLoading guard with skeleton message (stub=false, ready for context field).
0.7 Empty state: Added rows.length===0 guard with 'No basis opportunities available.' message.
0.8 Error state: Added error guard with rose-colored error message (stub=null, ready for context field).
0.9 Dead code: MOCK_BASIS_DATA and its reduce-on-hardcoded-array usage removed; replaced with context-driven rows derivation.
1.4 Client filter cascade: defi-data-context.tsx does not have explicit clientIds cascade — org filter (hasDefiDesk) covers this partially. Open gap for context update.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
